action.description: The committee on TRN recommend that the measure be PASSED, UNAMENDED. The votes were as follows: 6 Ayes: Representative(s) Kila, Miyake, Evslin, Grandinetti, Kitagawa, Muraoka; Ayes with reservations: none;  Noes: none; and 3 Excused: Representative(s) La Chica, Cochran, Pierick.
